reviews.comment:
Atención deficiente como en casi todos los ACA, cargué combustible y de regreso me falló la camioneta por agua en el diésel

(Translated by Google)
Poor service, as is typical at most ACA stations. I filled up with fuel and on the way back my truck broke down due to water in the diesel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMwNDhXZ1F3EAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y buena confitería. Ofrecen variedad en viandas para el que no quiera simplemente unos sandwiches. La opción preferida a la hora de ir a cargar combustible o hacer una pausa en viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and excellent pastries. They offer a variety of food options for those who don't just want sandwiches. The preferred option when refueling or taking a break during a trip.
